tasks.title: Release v0.11.0
tasks.description:
Promote CHANGELOG [Unreleased] to v0.11.0, bump package.json, tag, create GitHub release.

Scope: CHANGELOG.md, package.json, git tag

tasks.title: Formal JSON schemas for all kit/core configs
tasks.description:
Create JSON Schema files for agents.json, routing.json, autopilot.json, loop.json, token-optimization.json, hooks.json. Enable IDE validation and CI enforcement.

Scope: kit/schema/*.schema.json (new/update), scripts/validate-schemas.js (update)

tasks.title: Close top parity gaps across adapters
tasks.description:
Parity audit shows 14 gaps. Highest impact: add MCP merge to codex adapter, add durable execution to opencode/codex/cursor/windsurf/antigravity.

Scope: kit/adapters/*.sh

tasks.title: Expand kit/core/mcp.json with recommended MCP servers per tool
tasks.description:
Current mcp.json is minimal. Add recommended servers (filesystem, git, fetch, context7, sequential-thinking) with per-tool enable/disable guidance.

Scope: kit/core/mcp.json (update), adapters (update MCP merge logic)

tasks.title: Design portable plugin system for kit extensions
tasks.description:
Allow third-party skills, hooks, and tool configs to be installed via forge-kit. Inspired by claw-code's plugin lifecycle and Paperclip's plugin model.

Scope: kit/plugins/ (new directory), kit/install.sh (update), design doc

tasks.title: Pre-built company templates (Paperclip Clipmart style)
tasks.description:
Create importable org templates in companies/ beyond fullstack-forge: solopreneur, startup-mvp, agency, open-source-maintainer. Each with agents, skills, and routing tailored to the org type.

Scope: companies/ (new directories)

tasks.title: Heartbeat/routine system for scheduled agent work
tasks.description:
Agents should be able to run on schedules (daily dep audit, weekly security scan, on-PR CI watch). Inspired by Paperclip's heartbeat system. Define schedule format and adapter hooks.

Scope: kit/core/schedules.json (new), schedule skill already exists

tasks.title: Document skill format differences for Cursor and Windsurf
tasks.description:
Cursor uses .mdc rules format, Windsurf uses .windsurfrules. Document how kit/core/skills/*.md map to each tool's native skill/rule format and update adapters if needed.

Scope: implementations/cursor/README.md, implementations/windsurf/README.md (new)

tasks.title: Create implementations/antigravity/ reference guide
tasks.description:
Antigravity adapter exists but has no reference implementation docs. Create setup guide similar to claude-code/codex/opencode.

Scope: implementations/antigravity/ (new directory + README.md)

tasks.title: Per-agent tool access control in agents.json
Cost tracking config and session budget limits
Create dispatch skill for spawning subtasks
Create schedule skill for recurring automated runs
Create memory skill for cross-session persistence
Parity audit script (cross-tool capability gap report)
Paperclip-inspired specialty agents with org chart
